escalations.title: JavaScript Injection via Handlebars (RCE)
escalations.fix: Upgrade handlebars to >=4.7.9 via npm audit fix --force in Source/Backend
escalations.exploit_scenario: If any user-supplied input reaches handlebars template compilation (prototype pollution chain), remote code execution is possible with zero authentication precondition.
escalations.exploitability: zero-precondition (if untrusted template input reaches handlebars)

escalations.title: Arbitrary Code Execution via Protobufjs
escalations.fix: Upgrade protobufjs to >=7.5.5 in platform/orchestrator and portal/Backend
escalations.exploit_scenario: Untrusted .proto file content passed to protobufjs parser allows prototype pollution leading to arbitrary code execution.
escalations.exploitability: zero-precondition (if any .proto content comes from user input or untrusted source)

p1_findings.title: Traceability Enforcer Blind to Specifications/ Directory
p1_findings.detail: Enforcer auto-detects only Plans/ requirements.md, never scans Specifications/. 89 FRs in Specifications/ are invisible to CI. Creates a structural false-green verification gate.
p1_findings.recommendation: Add Specifications/ scan mode with explicit NOT_STARTED status; distinguish not-yet-implemented from silently missing.

p2_findings.title: Route Handlers Bypass Service Layer (20+ Direct Store Calls)
p2_findings.recommendation: Introduce thin service functions for CRUD; apply the existing dashboard.ts pattern to CRUD routes.

p2_findings.title: GET /api/search Not Wired in app.ts — DependencyPicker Broken at Runtime
p2_findings.recommendation: Add routes/search.ts and mount at /api/search; contract is in Source/Shared/api-contracts.md.

p2_findings.title: dependencyCheckDuration Histogram Missing from metrics.ts
p2_findings.recommendation: Add Histogram named dependency_check_duration_seconds; instrument isReady() and detectCycle(); add test assertion.

p2_findings.title: ReDoS in path-to-regexp — Route Matching DoS Attack Vector
ReDoS in picomatch — Catastrophic Backtracking in Glob Patterns

p3_findings.title: Logger Missing Production/Development Format Switch
p3_findings.recommendation: Add NODE_ENV !== 'production' branch for human-readable dev output.

p3_findings.title: Duplicate Logger Abstraction — workItemStore.ts Bypasses Normalization Wrapper
pending_dependencies Status Specified But Not Implemented
ESLint react-hooks/exhaustive-deps Suppressions Without Documented Reason
api-contracts.md References Unspecified Ghost FRs (FR-070 – FR-085)
Brace-expansion DoS via Malformed Brace Patterns

not_run.reason: Services offline (backend/frontend not reachable at health endpoints)
not_run.mode_fallback: static — no report generated this audit

not_run.reason: Services offline — requires all services healthy for dynamic mode
not_run.mode_fallback: static — no report generated this audit

cross_references.root_cause: Verification gate scope mismatch (Plans/ vs Specifications/)
cross_references.single_fix: Extend traceability-enforcer.py to scan Specifications/ with NOT_STARTED/PLANNED status markers
cross_references.fix_impact: Resolves governance false-green AND ghost FR reference confusion

cross_references.root_cause: Missing service layer abstraction for CRUD routes
cross_references.single_fix: Introduce workItemService.ts with CRUD + state-transition logic; pending_dependencies status included
cross_references.fix_impact: Resolves architecture violation AND implements missing status correctly

cross_references.root_cause: Transitive dependency drift in platform/orchestrator and portal/Backend
cross_references.single_fix: Single npm update run in platform/orchestrator and portal/Backend covering protobufjs >=7.5.5 + path-to-regexp >=0.1.13
cross_references.fix_impact: Resolves 1 P1 and 1 P2 with a single dependency upgrade pass
